feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Modify one column of internal table using variable value
entry.content:
If you are trying to modify one or more columns of internal table by using variable value 

follow the below method to do it.

Declare work area (structure) of that same internal table 
Assign value of variable to the specific column. ex: ls_sample-name = lv_name_var

MODIFY lt_internal_tab FROM ls_sample TRANSPORTING name (column names) WHERE some condition.

ls_main_new_data-demd_n_due_date = lv_new_dn_duedate.
ls_main_new_data-bli_due_date = lv_new_bli_due.
*
MODIFY lt_new_demand_main FROM ls_main_new_data TRANSPORTING bli_due_date demd_n_due_date
 WHERE bli_due_date = '00000000' AND demd_n_due_date = '00000000' .

entry.title: Finding Data Source for Fiori Application Value Help in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I need guidance on identifying the data source of a Fiori application’s value help in the S/4HANA Public Cloud. My requirement is to enhance a standard F4 help in a Fiori application.

Could you please assist me in understanding how to locate this information?

Thank you.

Best regards,
Shankar

entry.title: Need help! How to set ETag for a PATCH request with OData V2 Remote Client Proxy
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Good Day!

Currently I'm developing a feature in SAP BTP ABAP environment, which will communicate with our SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud system through API (remote OData) to update Product Master Data.

Precisely, I'm trying to update Change Master header data through this API. I'm using OData remote client proxy with Service Consumption Model and call to a PATCH request to achieve the desired outcome.

Now the thing is, when I execute the request, it said If-Match is missing. So I try to handle this by first calling a GET request to the same Entity (with same key), then get the ETag from the response header.

After that I add the ETag as the If-Match value and call the PATCH request again. But this time the response is "If-Match is requested but no ETag property was found" and it ends up with error.

I tried multiple ways, like using HTTP client only, or change the format of the ETag value. But none of them really helps.

I'll put the source code I used below for more details.

 

 

    DATA lo_resource      TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_resource_entity.
    DATA lo_request       TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_update.
    DATA lo_read_request  TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_read.
    DATA ls_patch_req_busi_data TYPE ty_patch_request_data.
    DATA ls_read_data TYPE ty_read_data.

    IF mo_client_proxy IS INITIAL.
*      mo_client_proxy = get_client_proxy( ).
      " Create http client
      DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
                                                   comm_scenario  = '<my_communication_scenario>'
                                                   comm_system_id = '<my_communication_system>'
                                                   service_id     = '<my_service_id>' ).
      DATA(lo_http_client) = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).

      mo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(
                            is_proxy_model_key       = VALUE #( repository_id       = 'DEFAULT'
                                                                proxy_model_id      = gc_proxy_model_id-cma
                                                                proxy_model_version = '0001' )
                            io_http_client           = lo_http_client
                            iv_relative_service_root = '' ).
    ENDIF.

    " Navigate to the resource and create a request for the update operation
    lo_resource = mo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set(
                    'A_CHANGE_MASTER' )->navigate_with_key( ms_entity_key ).

    " Get Etag
    lo_read_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_read( ).
    DATA(lo_read_response) = lo_read_request->execute( ).
    DATA(lv_etag) = lo_read_response->get_etag( ).

    lo_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_update( /iwbep/if_cp_request_update=>gcs_update_semantic-patch ).

    lo_request->set_if_match(   " <--- Error will be raised at this step
      EXPORTING
        iv_etag = lv_etag    " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/"{ lv_etag }"|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/'{ lv_etag }'|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/"'{ lv_etag }'"|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = '*'                 " Not working
    ).

    ls_patch_req_busi_data = CORRESPONDING #( ms_business_data ).
    lo_request->set_business_data(
      EXPORTING
        is_business_data            = ls_patch_req_busi_data
        it_provided_property        = me->get_entity_properties( ls_patch_req_busi_data ) ).

    " Execute the request
    lo_request->execute( ).

I really needs help for this point, maybe I messed up something in between? Hopefully someone can show me the way.

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Why should I always use Extension Includes rather than Append structure?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Recently, I came across a recommendation for Extension Includes. It states:

"SAP often uses extension control to enforce the use of extension includes.

Extension includes are specific structure types that are included in one or several database table definitions. If customers or partners want to add fields to the table, they have to create an append structure for this extension include rather than a direct append for the database table.

The main benefits are as follows:

  • The software provider can use the same extension include in several database table definitions and structure types. This ensures that additional fields are added to several tables in a consistent way.
  • The software provider can decide to release only the extension include and not the database table definition itself."

Now, my assumptions are as follows:

  1. If I need to extend all database objects where the same Extension Include has been used, the recommendation is correct.
  2. If I need to extend just one database object and it has a specific Extension Include, the recommendation is correct if scalability is not a concern in the future for other DB objects.
  3. However, if I need to extend just one database object with an Extension Include that has been used in multiple other database objects, I think the recommendation should be to use an APPEND structure.

Please let me know whether my third assumption is correct or if I have missed something, or if there are some design challenges I might encounter with direct APPEND or indirect APPEND in the extension include.

entry.title: SAP IAG TandD application plan
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please let know the meaning of TandD application plan for SAP IAG

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: Custom Extension in an MDK App (Using Metadata Approach)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I am trying to create a custom extension for SSAM 2310. I followed this  Create Extension Controls  documentation, but I encountered a problem. My workspace contains two projects: one is the standard SSAM 2310 metadata, and the other is ZComponent(ZSSAM2310), where I have made all the modifications.

I created my custom extension within the ZComponent(ZSSAM2310) project. However, I am getting a 'Failed to find module' error with the specific extension location.

How can I resolve this issue? Could you please provide some insights or suggestions on how to create and access the extension from ZComponent in my SSAM application?

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud 

Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

entry.title: SAP BTP trial - how to learn about it and use the trial
entry.content:
Hello - I work for an organization where we were notified about some free BTP trial we could enroll in - to presumably learn about the SAP product.  I enrolled and can "access" the trial system - but no idea what to do there.  Is there any sort of guide or documentation on what to do?  Or are you expected to just figure it out on your own.  Please advise.  (I already went thru the people in my organization that offered this trial up - and first they had me log a ticket to their team - and then they just referred me to this site and told me to ask here)

==

Hands on Trial Versions:-

... has partnered with SAP to offer trial versions of SAP BTP and SAP Analytics Cloud. To access these environments, please complete your registration. Make sure you have a valid S-User ID/Universal ID to benefit from these free trials.

entry.title: ABAP RAP
entry.content: How can you implement dynamic image upload and retrieval functionality in an SAP ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP) application for the SAP BTP, ABAP environment?

entry.title: PO creation using BAPI_PO_CREATE1 when custom fields are in 'EKKO_INCL_EEW_PS'
entry.content: I need to create PO using BAPI 'BAPI_PO_CREATE1'.Also There are custom fields added in EKKO in include EKKO_INCL_EEW_PS and I have the requirement to update these fields also. Could someone please suggest the EXTENSIONIN structure and its value that I need to pass to above bapi in this case where the field is not in CI_EKKODB, but in EKKO_INCL_EEW_PS.

entry.title: Visual Filter in BTP RAP List Page App
entry.content:
Hi all,

i've created in the BTP ABAP Environment an RAP based List Report Application ( ODATA V4 ) and deployed it. Now i wan't to extend this app with the "Visual Filters" and implemented the coding like in the documentation descriped in the relevant CDS Views.

E.g. like here: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/653ed0f4f0d743dbb33ace4f68886c4e.html.

But for any reason the visual filter is not shown in the UI and I don't get any errors in the activation or display of the App.
Is there maybe a restriction that I'm not aware of? 

Thank you and best regards,

Patrick

entry.title: Adjustment of table xyz was aborted! Table xyz does not exist in the database
entry.content:
Hello, 

When I adjust table using quick fix on btp system I got an error and I couldn't adjust table. After that when I press the quick fix I can't see adjust table on list anymore. Just I can see continue adjustment of database table and this is not allowed, always get an error. 

Otherwise I can't delete same table because of error "xyz still being updated". How can I solve this problem?

entry.title: Enabling ATC / CVA on BTP
entry.content:
I am checking SAP blogs on how to enable ATC / CVA on SAP BTP so as to reduce the no of user licenses on SAP BTP. From both ADT and custom code migration app developer / lead should be able to check the code from  ECC  systems.

As we do not have S/4 HANA as a checked system I want to know if manual implementation is recommended or Automatic option ie enabling CIAS workflow.

Below is the blog that I am referring.

Usage of ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud for ... - SAP Community

Please let me know if the checked system is ECC(netweaver 750) which option is recommended and do we have a step by step tutorial guide for a beginner to enable ATC , CCM app on BTP. It is ok to follow the above blog?

Regards

Sweta Agarwal

 

 

 

 

Regards

Sweta Agarwal

entry.title: The Required Functional modules Knowledge.
entry.content:
Hello guys, Hope you're all good and doing well 💪

I want to know what is the required functional modules knowledge that any ABAP developer should know about to be able to communicate with the functional consultant in smooth way, achieve more accepted results and of course to be able to think about solutions in more effective way. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Unable to Calculate the Total Sum value In Decimals, Rounding issue
entry.content:
Hi, 
In one of the Standard routine added custom include, to achieve the Business requirement.
Some logic written. Requirement is for Fiori App. So, In backend Abap code written.
There is a Transaction document "Manage Solution Quotations" Abap code will trigger.
If document is having 6 lines. 6 times code will trigger and calculate the value and  
The result value will move into the Below Variable.
xkwert LIKE komv-kwert, (Condition Value)

Here(in the table) the logic is  A*B/C = D
In Normally if i calculate the logic in Excel Values are coming like D column 
But if it comes to coding Column E, Values are coming Bcz of Decimal 2 Variable is having.
if You observe both columns sum value D and E.. Rounding is missing At E Column.
Not able to Find the exact solution. Here in the code.. For every line(no of lines in the transaction) code will trigger. Suppose having 5 lines.. more than 5 times code will trigger and logic will execute bcz of standard routine.
Here 9999.98 value Standard code is calculating. Now issue is it should be Roud the value 10k
Some cases like 5k and 9k How can i achieve this one.

ABCDE
100003738098384.953799.3623799.36
10000236.3698384.9524.02424.02
10000253598384.95257.6614257.66
10000796.9598384.9581.0032481
10000796.9598384.9581.0032481
10000253598384.95257.6614257.66
10000253598384.95257.6614257.66
10000236.3698384.9524.02424.02
1000051333.3398384.955217.65217.6
   100009999.98

entry.title: Software Component (Partner Demo Development Tenant) Multitenancy SaaS Application
entry.content:
Hello Dear Experts,

I am trying to create a software component to develop multitenant SaaS products in the partner demo development system. However, I get an error like the one below.

SCLM(Software Component Lifecycle Management) application is not configured in the current business tenant

 

 https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3530333

Resolution
TDD system (Partner Demo Development Tenant) is being used and in this tenant only predefined Software Components exist and other software components cannot be created:
 
  • Software Component ZPARTNER => Multi-Off Development
  • Software Component ZLOCAL => System Local Development which can not be transported or deployed


This is what SAP said about the error. In this case, we seem to be unable to create a software component, but is there a different way we can proceed? I wanted to ask you about something that can be done to create a software component.

Or do we need a different partner system so that we can create software components for our developments?

If we create a development package with the namespace we have previously registered in our partner development system and develop it with the ZPARTNER software component, will we have problems in the future when offering this product as a multitenant SaaS application? How should we proceed?

Reasons for Necessity:

Dear @FrankJentsch, your valuable comments and suggestions will make a great contribution. Thank you very much for your support.

entry.title: Add new Column in ME31K/ME32K Items -> Service Specifications (screen 400 of program SAPLMLSP)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have an requirement to add new column in ME31K/ME32K -> Items -> Service Specifications table control.

How to use existing customer ESLL - fields USERF1_TXT, USERF2_TXT for this purpose?

if not possible then is there any other way other to add new column other than selecting  item ->Details', then to chose tab 'Other' on the of screen 0400 of program SAPLMLSP.

Anyone have an idea?

Thanks,

Arpita

entry.title: Principal propagation through AWS Application Load Balancer (ALB)
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please help in answering the following questions.

  1. The prerequisites mention that for identity propagation, mutual authentication (mTLS) is mandatory, then how is the case 1 of SAP note 3482634 applicable when mtls is disabled on the load balancer.
  2. "As per SAP note 3482634, If SAP Cloud Connector version is lower than 2.17.0, we need to disable ECDHE, DHE ciphersuites using property jdk.tls.disabledAlgorithms in file $JAVA_HOME/jre/lib/security/java.security (on unix/linux). Can you please help me understand why this is required?" 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: /sdf/mon: About the difference between allocated and attached
entry.content:
Question in Japanese version:

Tr-cd:/n/sdf/smonで確認できる、Snapshot Monitorにて、
Ext. Mem. allocated
Ext. Mem. attached
の項目（列）がありますが、この２つの項目の違いがわかりません。

それぞれの項目の説明と、この２つの項目の違いを教えていただけますでしょうか。

Question in English version:

What's the difference about Ext. Mem. allocated and Ext. Mem. attached in SDF/SMON ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pass additional field from ERP to EWM while creating EGR in EWM . Could you please help.
entry.content: I want to pass additional field from ERP to EWM while creating EGR in EWM . Could you please help. I am calling /SPE/INB_EGR_CREATE from ERP to create EGR in EWM.

entry.title: Issue: Data Not Displaying on CDS Endpoint Despite Presence in HANA Table
entry.content:
The Issue:

While working with SAP S/4HANA or SAP Cloud Platform, I encountered an issue where data in the HANA database table is not visible via the CDS endpoint, despite the data being present and accessible directly from the HANA table.


Here's a summary of the issue:

  • The data exists in the HANA table (Attached an image below).
  • A CDS view is defined to expose the data via an OData endpoint.
  • The OData service is properly registered, and the metadata is available.
  • However, when consuming the OData service, no data is returned, even though it should be.

 

 

Troubleshooting Steps We Tried:

Here are the troubleshooting steps we attempted to resolve the issue:

  1. Clearing Cache and Restarting Services
  2. Reviewing the CDS View Definition
  3. Verifying Service Registration
  4. Checking User Authorization

Investigating HANA CLI Query Results

Seeking Help from the SAP Community:

As I have encountered this issue in my own project, I would like to reach out to the SAP community for assistance. If anyone has experienced this problem or has insights on what might be causing this discrepancy, your input would be greatly appreciated.


I would love to hear from anyone in the SAP community who has encountered this issue before. Please share your insights, troubleshooting tips, or solutions to help resolve this issue. Your input will be invaluable in understanding and overcoming this challenge.

SAP Community

Node.js 

SAP HANA Cloud 

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP
